/CAL  DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIORUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/INTRW: SPANISH/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 11-05-98 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A  VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION  245(A)(1), ENTERED 10-01-98, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT CHARGING COUNT 3 AS A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 236,/IRRC/FAWC/DEFT ADV ANG:3/TWS/X: PSR WAIVED,/CH2:ISS:PROB 3 Y:PJ364D/CTS:364/VF2:200/CTORD: PAY $30 ICNA/CTORD: PAY $40 COURT SECURITY FEE/CTORD: FINES AND FEES ARE DEEMED PAID IN FULL/OBEY/ACCEP/NUNCDAT: 10-01-98/DISM3/CTORD: PROBATION IS TERMINATED SUCCESSFULLY/X: NO ORDER WAS SUBMITTED FOR SIGNATURE AND FILING,//CTORD:PROBATION IN # 1797227 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS SUCCESSFUL/
/AJW/CH1 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ104D/CTS 104/WS/MISD2 18/X:SPECIAL CONDITIONS OF PROBATION FOR GANG MEMBERS AND ASSOCIATES FILED ANDINCORPORATED BY REFERENCE,/VF4:$200/PC/PSR/BKFEE/INTR:MLA/ACCEP/
